resources.name: scarleteel-bait-user
resources.purpose: Zero-permission IAM user whose access keys are stored in terraform.tfstate — the lateral movement target
resources.configuration_notes: force_destroy=True. No attached policies — zero permissions by design.

resources.name: scarleteel-bait-key
resources.purpose: Long-term IAM access key for the bait user. Stored in terraform.tfstate bait file.
resources.configuration_notes: Key ID and secret exported to terraform.tfstate object.

resources.name: AdminJoe
resources.purpose: IAM user used to test the AdminJoe naming-convention bypass. Permission boundary denies iam:CreateAccessKey for 'admin*' (StringLike, case-sensitive) but capital A bypasses the condition.
resources.configuration_notes: No policies attached. Used as target for CreateAccessKey bypass test. Username must start with capital A to test the bypass.

resources.name: scarleteel-vuln-ec2-role
resources.purpose: Over-privileged IAM role with permission boundary. Boundary denies iam:CreateAccessKey for 'admin*' (case-sensitive StringLike) — the AdminJoe bypass test target.
resources.configuration_notes: Inline policy: s3:ListAllMyBuckets/GetObject/ListBucket + 7 Lambda read APIs + cloudtrail:StopLogging/DescribeTrails + secretsmanager:ListSecrets/GetSecretValue + iam:CreateUser/CreateAccessKey/ListUsers/ListRoles. Permission boundary attached: denies iam:CreateAccessKey for username matching 'admin*'.

resources.name: scarleteel-dummy-logs / scarleteel-dummy-scripts
resources.purpose: Bait S3 buckets containing fake log and script data for exfiltration simulation.
resources.configuration_notes: force_destroy=True. Contain syslog and db_loader.sh objects.

resources.name: scarleteel-tf-state-bucket
resources.purpose: S3 bucket containing terraform.tfstate bait file with plaintext IAM access keys for the zero-permission bait user.
resources.configuration_notes: force_destroy=True. Contains terraform.tfstate with aws_iam_access_key for bait user.

resources.name: bait-secret (prod/database/master_credentials)
resources.purpose: Bait Secrets Manager secret containing fake production database credentials. The attacker harvests this in Phase 6 via ListSecrets + GetSecretValue.
resources.configuration_notes: Secret name: prod/database/master_credentials. Contains JSON: {db_username, db_password, host, port}. recovery_window_in_days=0 for clean teardown.

resources.name: ProprietaryAlgoFunc
resources.purpose: Lambda function with DB_PASS environment variable. Source code and env vars exfiltrated via GetFunction + ListVersionsByFunction.

resources.name: scarleteel-trail
resources.purpose: CloudTrail trail disabled by the attacker in Phase 4 via StopLogging.
resources.configuration_notes: Single-region trail. Requires bucket policy allowing cloudtrail.amazonaws.com.

resources.name: scarleteel-vuln-container-host
resources.purpose: EC2 instance with vulnerable Flask RCE app (Docker container, port 8080) and IMDSv1 enabled. The primary attack entry point.
resources.configuration_notes: Amazon Linux 2023 t3.micro. UserData: iptables flush, Docker install, Flask container build/run. metadata_options: http_tokens=optional, hop_limit=2. SG: port 8080 open to 0.0.0.0/0.

resources.name: scarleteel-tls-key (fallback)
resources.purpose: Optional SSH keypair provisioned via pulumi-tls as a fallback for manual access if SSM is unavailable. Not part of the attack path.
resources.configuration_notes: algorithm=RSA, rsa_bits=4096. Created only if pulumi-tls is available.
